title: [MTR4]Tianjin Metro Style PIS
description: Add a Tianjin Metro Style PIS for Joban Client Mod.
body:
# English
This pack added a PIS for Joban Client Mod.

Required Minecraft Transit Railway Mod 4.0 or above, and Joban Client Mod 2.1 or above.

* The code is generated by AI tools.

# 中文
添加了一个天津地铁风格的PIS屏幕。

需要 Minecraft Transit Railway Mod 4.0 及以上版本和 Joban Client Mod 2.1 及以上版本。

* 代码使用AI工具编写。
